feed.title: PLV-BLOG
feed.subtitle: A minimal, portfolio, sidebar, bootstrap Jekyll theme with responsive web design and focuses on text presentation.

entry.title: Emotet Analysis Part 1: Unpacking
entry.summary: Introduction That’s will be my first post in the blog, i will make a series of posts about Emotet. Emotet is a Trojan that is primarily spread through spam emails (malspam), we’re going to digg deep in the anlysis of this Trojan, the first part is about unpacking the malware then we will try to analyse the different modules and techniques used by the malware to compromise a machine, so fire...
